ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_assessment: High quality, text-based PDF with clearly legible fields

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_assessment: High quality, text-based PDF with clearly legible fields

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate remarks section contains 'ORDER REF: 2648-02' and 'INVOICE N° 1002990' — neither constitutes an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar is present.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: header/branding 'FORPAC international ab.' (top left logo area)
Invoice page 1: Seller block — 'Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4E, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden'
Invoice page 1: Signature stamp area — 'FORPAC international ab.'

document_pairing.method: Certificate references invoice number 1002990; invoice file contains invoice number 1002990. Consignor 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' matches invoice seller.

criteria_met: Invoice number match: certificate references 1002990, invoice bears number 1002990
Consignor match: FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB identified in invoice seller block
Consignee match: SARL IBARAR EMBALLAGE identified in invoice buyer and consignee blocks

candidates.normalized_text: nous certifions que les marchandises faisant lobjet de cette livraison sont d'origine français...

checkpoints.certificate_value: FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB, KUNGSPORTEN 4E, SE-427 50, BILLDAL, SWEDEN
checkpoints.invoice_value: Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4E, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden (Seller block); also 'FORPAC international ab.' in header/branding

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.0 – Koncernstruktur / Name search in all files
comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — Exact name match in invoice seller block ('Forpac International AB') and header branding ('FORPAC international ab.')

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice seller name after normalization
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'forpac international ab' → Invoice seller: 'forpac international ab' — IDENTICAL after case normalization

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor country: SWEDEN. Invoice seller country: Sweden. Also confirmed via VAT prefix SE in 'SE556598155101'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — Country Sweden confirmed both explicitly and via VAT prefix

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name found in invoice seller block and header
Name verification — exact match after normalization
Country verification via indirect identifier — VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' in Sweden. Invoice seller block explicitly states 'Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4E, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden' with VAT no. SE556598155101. Company name is identical after case normalization. Address matches (Kungsporten 4E, Billdal). Country Sweden confirmed explicitly and via SE VAT prefix. Clear MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: SARL IBARAR EMBALLAGE, NIF: 001716104441751, AIN EL MALHNA CIT 440, LOGEMENT BT 16, 207-208 COMMUNE GU DE CONSTANTINE, 16048 ALGER, Algeria
checkpoints.invoice_value: Buyer: SARL IBARAR Emballage, NIF: 001716104441751, Ain El Malhna Cit 440 Logement BT 16, 207-208 Commune Gue de Constantine, 16048 Alger, Algeria; Consignee: SARL IBARAR Emballage (same details)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains both Buyer and Consignee fields. Both contain 'SARL IBARAR Emballage'. Per priority order, Buyer field is primary factoring field.
comparison_steps.result: Primary field identified: Buyer = SARL IBARAR Emballage

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'SARL IBARAR EMBALLAGE' → Invoice Buyer: 'SARL IBARAR Emballage'. After case normalization: 'sarl ibarar emballage' = 'sarl ibarar emballage'
Certificate consignee country: Algeria. Invoice buyer country: Algeria.
Certificate NIF: 001716104441751. Invoice Buyer NIF: 001716104441751. Exact match — same legal party confirmed.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification — Buyer field is primary
Name verification — exact match after normalization

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'SARL IBARAR EMBALLAGE' with NIF 001716104441751 in Algeria. Invoice buyer block states 'SARL IBARAR Emballage' with identical NIF and address in Algeria. Invoice also has a separate Consignee field with the same information. Company name matches exactly after case normalization. NIF is identical. Country Algeria matches. Clear MATCH.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Lines 1-4: Testliner, 90gsm - non collé (various reelwidths); Lines 5-7: Fluting 90gsm (various reelwidths); Total: 80 Reel

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers in certificate. Proceeding to Priority 2.

Certificate identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 1: 'TESTLINER'. Invoice lines 1-4 description: 'Testliner, 90gsm - non collé'. After case normalization: 'testliner' found in 'testliner, 90gsm - non collé'.
Certificate identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 2: 'FLUTING'. Invoice lines 5-7 description: 'Fluting 90gsm'. After case normalization: 'fluting' found in 'fluting 90gsm'.

Invoice adds '90gsm - non collé' and reelwidth/diameter specifications. These are product specifications that do not change the product identity. Certificate description 'TESTLINER & FLUTING' covers both product types. '80 REELS' matches '80 Reel' total quantity line in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Additional specifications in invoice do not affect product identity — permitted under 4.3.4

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation identified in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions (specifications) do not cause MISMATCH

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as '80 REELS TESTLINER & FLUTING'. Invoice contains 7 line items: 4 lines of 'Testliner, 90gsm - non collé' (various widths, totaling 40 reels) and 3 lines of 'Fluting 90gsm' (various widths, totaling 42 reels but total line shows 80 Reel). The identity-bearing main designations 'TESTLINER' and 'FLUTING' are both explicitly found in the invoice. The additional specifications (90gsm, non collé, reelwidths, diameters) are non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4. The number of reels (80) matches the invoice total line. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate says 'TESTLINER & FLUTING' but invoice has separate Testliner and Fluting line items with additional specifications
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.3.4 permits additional non-identity-bearing specifications. Both identity-bearing terms are found in invoice. The certificate uses a summary description covering both product types.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 states '208,874 MT'. This is the verification-basis quantity. Box 6 mentions '80 REELS' as package count.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 – Occurrence check: numeric value in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Invoice total line: '80 Reel 208,874 MT'. Certificate value '208,874' — need to determine decimal convention. Certificate uses comma. Context: 208,874 MT = 208.874 metric tons. Invoice total line shows '208,874 MT'. Same notation used in both documents.
comparison_steps.result: Numeric value 208,874 identified in invoice total line with same unit MT

comparison_steps.description: Both certificate and invoice use comma as decimal separator (European notation). Certificate: 208,874 MT = 208.874 MT. Invoice: 208,874 MT = 208.874 MT. Verification: sum of invoice line quantities (23.686+4.804+47.142+22.808+39.74+23.856+46.838 = 208.874 MT). Confirmed both values represent 208.874 metric tons.

Certificate states '208,874 MT' without explicit GW/NW designation. Invoice total line states '208,874 MT' also without explicit GW/NW. Applying rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate has one weight value, same value identified in invoice, and invoice does not contain a contradicting alternative weight of another category in the total line.
comparison_steps.result: Single weight value without category — value matches, no contradiction → MATCH per 4.4.2.2 point 2

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check — numeric value identified in invoice
Single weight value without GW/NW category — value matches in invoice with no contradicting alternative

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '208,874 MT'. Invoice total line states '80 Reel 208,874 MT'. The comma is used as decimal separator in both documents (European convention). Both represent 208.874 metric tons. The sum of individual invoice lines (23.686+4.804+47.142+22.808+39.74+23.856+46.838) = 208.874 MT, confirming the total. Neither document specifies GW or NW explicitly. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2, since there is a single weight value in the certificate that matches the invoice total and no contradicting alternative weight category exists, this is MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because weight category (GW/NW) is not specified
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.4.2.2 point 2 applies: single weight value without category, value matches in invoice, no contradicting alternative weight category present → MATCH

comparison_steps.description: Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: France'. This is a dedicated origin field.

France is an EU member state. Certificate states 'FRANCE' as origin and the certificate is issued under 'EUROPEAN UNION' heading. Invoice confirms 'Country of origin: France'. Additionally, invoice declaration text states goods are 'd'origine français' (of French origin). Fully consistent.
comparison_steps.result: France verified as origin — consistent with EU certificate framework

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains French text declaration: 'Nous certifions que les marchandises faisant lobjet de cette livraison sont d'origine français' — confirming French origin.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in dedicated 'Country of origin' field in invoice
Normalization of country name — case normalization
EU normalization — France is EU member state, consistent with EU certificate

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'FRANCE' as country of origin. Invoice has a dedicated 'Country of origin' field stating 'France'. After case normalization both read 'france'. The invoice also contains a French-language declaration confirming 'd'origine français'. France is an EU member state, consistent with the EU Certificate of Origin. Clear and unambiguous MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE — no LC reference found in certificate
Single certificate in Document A, single invoice in Document B. Certificate references invoice 1002990, which matches Document B.
PASS — Invoice number match (1002990), consignor match (FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB), consignee match (SARL IBARAR EMBALLAGE). All three criteria met.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' found in invoice header, seller block, and signature area
Sweden confirmed via explicit country in seller block and SE prefix in VAT number
Buyer field identified as primary; Consignee field also present with same party
MATCH — identical after case normalization; NIF also matches
NOT_APPLICABLE — no article numbers in certificate

rule_evaluation_log.description: Priority 2: Controlled text matching of identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — 'TESTLINER' and 'FLUTING' both identified in invoice line items
Applied — invoice specifications (90gsm, non collé, reelwidths) are non-identity-bearing
MATCH — 208,874 MT found in invoice total line
208,874 MT from box 7 used as verification basis

rule_evaluation_log.description: Weight category check — single value without GW/NW
rule_evaluation_log.result: Point 2 applied: single weight, value matches, no contradicting alternative → MATCH
MATCH — 'Country of origin: France' found in invoice
France is EU member state — consistent with EU Certificate of Origin

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Forpac International AB i Sverige, mottagaren SARL IBARAR Emballage i Algeriet, varubeskrivningen (Testliner & Fluting, 80 rullar), mängden 208,874 MT och ursprungslandet Frankrike kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Certificate consignor FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB in Sweden matches invoice seller. Consignee SARL IBARAR EMBALLAGE in Algeria matches invoice buyer/consignee including NIF. Goods description 'TESTLINER & FLUTING' (80 REELS) matches invoice line items. Quantity 208,874 MT matches invoice total. Origin FRANCE matches invoice 'Country of origin' field. Invoice number 1002990 matches certificate reference.
non_blocking_observations: Certificate weight 208,874 MT lacks explicit GW/NW designation, but invoice also provides only one total weight without GW/NW — accepted per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB, KUNGSPORTEN 4E, SE-427 50, BILLDAL, SWEDEN
sections.invoice_value: Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4E, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Land verifierat via explicit angivelse och SE-prefix i VAT-nummer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' i Sverige matchar exakt fakturans säljaruppgifter 'Forpac International AB' i Sverige efter normalisering av versaler. Adressen (Kungsporten 4E, Billdal) överensstämmer. Sverige bekräftas via explicit landangivelse och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.invoice_value: SARL IBARAR Emballage, NIF: 001716104441751, Algeria (Buyer & Consignee)
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning mot fakturans Buyer-fält. NIF-nummer identiskt. Land Algeriet bekräftat.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'SARL IBARAR EMBALLAGE' matchar fakturans köpare och mottagare 'SARL IBARAR Emballage' efter normalisering. NIF 001716104441751 är identiskt i båda dokumenten, vilket bekräftar samma juridiska person. Algeriet anges som land i båda dokumenten.

sections.invoice_value: Testliner, 90gsm - non collé (4 rader) + Fluting 90gsm (3 rader); Totalt 80 Reel
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning av identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningar. Ytterligare specifikationer (90gsm, non collé, rullbredder) bedöms som icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning anger 'TESTLINER & FLUTING' samt '80 REELS'. Fakturans artikelrader innehåller 'Testliner' och 'Fluting' med totalt 80 Reel. De identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningarna 'TESTLINER' och 'FLUTING' kan identifieras i fakturan. Ytterligare specifikationer som grammage, ytbehandling och rullbredder ändrar inte produktidentiteten.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll – numeriskt värde 208,874 MT identifierat i fakturans totalrad. Enstaka viktvärde utan GW/NW-kategori – inget motstridigt alternativt viktvärde i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger 208,874 MT. Fakturans totalrad anger identiskt värde: 80 Reel 208,874 MT. Varken certifikat eller faktura specificerar GW/NW. Eftersom det finns ett enda viktvärde som matchar och inget motstridigt alternativt viktvärde existerar, godkänns detta enligt regel 4.4.2.2 punkt 2.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning av ursprungsland efter normalisering av versaler. Frankrike är EU-medlemsstat, konsistent med EU-certifikat.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 anger 'FRANCE'. Fakturan innehåller ett explicit fält 'Country of origin: France'. Länderna matchar exakt efter normalisering. Fakturan innehåller dessutom en ursprungsdeklaration på franska som bekräftar franskt ursprung.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW on any checkpoint. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL. All confidence values ≥ 0.85.
